name: clara-nora-clara-roundtrip
description: Smoke test for Clara routing to Nora, Nora handling an analytics scenario, and Nora returning the caller to Clara cleanly.

userTurns.label: Analytics scenario
userTurns.text: Nora, compare three locations: Berlin booked 82 jobs at 18 percent quote acceptance, Potsdam booked 54 jobs at 29 percent, and Oranienburg booked 61 jobs at 11 percent. What stands out?

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Receptionist follow-up
userTurns.text: Clara, stay with me and show the receptionist demo.
